1 AND-NOT 67

0 AND-NOT 56
1 AND-NOT 67
2 I 7
3 I 0
4 I 1
5 I 2
6 I 3
7 I 4

Matched
0 AND-NOT 56
1 AND-NOT 67
2 I 7
3 I 0
4 I 1
5 I 2
6 I 3
7 I 4

Applying to 10000111
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 1
Output
0 AND-NOT 56 = AND(I 5,I 6n) = AND(I 5,NOT(I 6)) = AND(1,NOT(1)) = AND(1,0) = 0
1 AND-NOT 67 = AND(I 6,I 7n) = AND(I 6,NOT(I 7)) = AND(1,NOT(1)) = AND(1,0) = 0
2 I 7 = 1
3 I 0 = 1
4 I 1 = 0
5 I 2 = 0
6 I 3 = 0
7 I 4 = 0

\boxed{00110000}
